summary: New `tickets notes delete <conversation-id>` command wired into the notes subcommand tree. Hand-authored DELETE /conversations/{id} request with --dry-run / --yes consent gating and a JSON success envelope.
reason: Freshservice documents DELETE /conversations/{id} but does not declare it in the OpenAPI spec we generated from, so the generator never emitted a delete-note command. Notes are stored as conversations and the conversation id alone identifies the note (no /tickets/{ticket_id}/ segment).
validated_outcome: `tickets notes delete <id> --yes` returns HTTP 204 and the note disappears from `tickets conversations list-ticket <ticket-id>`; previously there was no CLI surface for note deletion.
